name: Transferencia de Archivos RDP Inusual Detectada
description: Se ha detectado una transferencia de archivos de gran tamaño a través de una sesión de Escritorio Remoto (RDP), lo que podría indicar exfiltración de datos o movimiento lateral no autorizado.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the RDP session activity.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname of the RDP server where the event occurred.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The username associated with the RDP session.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain of the user, if available.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the RDP connection.

parameters.name: source_port
parameters.description: The source port of the RDP connection.

parameters.name: bytes_transferred
parameters.description: The amount of data transferred in bytes.

parameters.name: LogonType
parameters.description: The Windows logon type (expected to be 10 for interactive remote).

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: The ID of the RDP session, if available.
